annotations.title: Why is Rust a critical programming language in 2026? | TechTarget
The Rust programming language is growing in popularity | TechSpot
Rust Code Delivers Security, Streamlines DevOps
An Empirical Study of Rust-for-Linux: The Success, Dissatisfaction, and Compromise | USENIX
Rust, the New Programming Language | IEEE Computer Society

content.text:
Certainly! Here are several authoritative and recent sources on the Rust programming language:

1. **"Why is Rust a critical programming language in 2026?"**  
   An article from TechTarget discussing Rust's growing importance in system development, web development, game development, and command-line tools. ([techtarget.com](https://www.techtarget.com/searchapparchitecture/tip/Why-is-Rust-a-critical-programming-language?utm_source=openai))

2. **"The Rust programming language is growing in popularity"**  
   A TechSpot article highlighting Rust's increasing adoption in major software projects and its rise in popularity among developers. ([techspot.com](https://www.techspot.com/news/99951-rust-programming-language-growing-popularity.html?utm_source=openai))

3. **"Rust Documentation"**  
   The official Rust documentation, including "The Book," the Rust Reference, and the Standard Library API Reference. ([mitaa.github.io](https://mitaa.github.io/rust/doc/?utm_source=openai))

4. **"Rust (programming language)"**  
   A comprehensive Wikipedia article covering Rust's history, features, and adoption in various industries. ([en.wikipedia.org](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rust_%28programming_language%29?utm_source=openai))

5. **"Rust Code Delivers Security, Streamlines DevOps"**  
   An article from Dark Reading discussing how Rust improves code security and DevOps efficiency, with insights from Google's Android development team. ([darkreading.com](https://www.darkreading.com/application-security/rust-code-delivers-better-security-streamlines-devops?utm_source=openai))

6. **"Rust Programming Language - InfoQ"**  
   A collection of recent articles and news about Rust, including developments in web development and AI-assisted compiler development. ([infoq.com](https://www.infoq.com/rust/?utm_source=openai))

7. **"Rust – InfoWorld"**  
   A section dedicated to Rust on InfoWorld, featuring news, how-tos, and analyses on Rust's evolution and usage. ([infoworld.com](https://www.infoworld.com/rust/?utm_source=openai))

8. **"Licenses - Rust Programming Language"**  
   The official Rust website detailing the licensing information for Rust and its associated projects. ([rust-lang.org](https://www.rust-lang.org/policies/licenses?utm_source=openai))

9. **"An Empirical Study of Rust-for-Linux: The Success, Dissatisfaction, and Compromise"**  
   A USENIX publication presenting a study on the integration of Rust into the Linux kernel, highlighting successes and challenges. ([usenix.org](https://www.usenix.org/publications/loginonline/empirical-study-rust-linux-success-dissatisfaction-and-compromise?utm_source=openai))

10. **"Rust, the New Programming Language"**  
    An IEEE Computer Society article introducing Rust and its features, emphasizing its speed and memory management capabilities. ([computer.org](https://www.computer.org/publications/tech-news/build-your-career/rust-the-exciting-new-programming-language?utm_source=openai))

These sources provide a comprehensive overview of Rust's features, adoption, and impact in the software development industry.
